_meta.calibration: Zone NAMES + brand mapping come from 'Brigade Road - Store layout.xlsx' (the official floor plan); pixel polygons are calibrated to each CAM's own 1920x1080 frame + observed YOLO trajectories. Camera roles: cam1/cam2 = store interior brand walls (browse), cam3 = outside main entrance (footfall line), cam5 = entrance + billing (cash + accessories). cam4 = store room (no customer zones). The `brands` array on each zone lists the POS brand_name values that map to that physical zone, enabling a zone<->POS-sales join. The funnel fuses cameras by 5-min time bucket, NOT by cross-camera identity.
_meta.feet_point: events use bbox bottom-center (person's floor position)

entry_line._note: Vertical line at the threshold; customers cross right(mall)->left(store) to enter.

cam1._role: interior browse — top brand wall (The Face Shop / Good Vibes / DermDoc) + F.O.H makeup

the_face_shop._note: Left section of the top wall: Korean skincare brands (The Face Shop, EB Korean).

dermdoc._note: Centre of the top wall: DermDoc / Good Vibes / derma shelves + F.O.H aisle.

makeup_unit._note: Right-hand F.O.H makeup/nail units and accessories table.

cam2._role: interior browse — bottom brand wall (Lakme / Faces Canada / Maybelline / Alps)

faces_canada._note: Right wall: colour-cosmetics brands (Lakme, Faces Canada, Maybelline, NY Bae).

alps_goodness._note: Left section near the entrance: Alps Goodness + naturals/haircare.

cam5._role: billing (entrance + cash counter + accessories); footfall NOT counted here (cam3 owns it)

cash_counter._note: Floor area around the white billing desk with the two laptops (point of sale).

accessories._note: Illuminated ACCESSORIES display board on the right. (GUBB is mapped to makeup_unit only, to avoid double-counting brand revenue across zones.)
